title: Custom eggless cakes for families in Marsden Park, Schofields and Box Hill
summary:
Riverstone Shopping Centre is now the closest place in North West Sydney to order a fully custom eggless cake.

15 flavours. 6 sizes from $39.99. Any design — send a photo reference and we'll recreate it. Jain-friendly and halal-friendly as standard.

48-hour notice minimum. That's what fresh baking actually takes. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. Pickup from Riverstone, free car park.
keywords: Marsden Park Schofields Box Hill North West Sydney
where to order custom eggless cake near Marsden Park
